<a name="module_BambuCam"></a>

## BambuCam

View model for BambuCam.

Binds the settings dialog (status panel, connection test, restart button)
and the webcam tab (MJPEG `<img>` with the computed stream URL).

**Author**: Ajimaru
**License**: AGPL-3.0-or-later
